sentences.arabic: الْمَقْهَى الْعَرَبِيُّ مَكَانٌ شَعْبِيٌّ يَجْتَمِعُ فِيهِ النَّاسُ لِشُرْبِ الشَّايِ وَالْقَهْوَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kafana je narodno mjesto gdje se ljudi okupljaju da piju čaj i kafu.
sentences.translationEn: The Arab coffeehouse is a popular place where people gather to drink tea and coffee.

sentences.arabic: يَلْعَبُ الرِّجَالُ الطَّاوِلَةَ وَالشِّطْرَنْجَ وَيُشَاهِدُونَ الْأَخْبَارَ عَلَى التِّلْفَازِ.
sentences.translation: Muškarci igraju tavlu i šah i gledaju vijesti na televiziji.
sentences.translationEn: Men play backgammon and chess and watch the news on television.

sentences.arabic: يَجْلِسُ الرَّجُلُ فِي الْمَقْهَى سَاعَاتٍ طَوِيلَةً يَتَحَدَّثُ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِ.
sentences.translation: Čovjek sjedi u kafani satima i razgovara s prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: A man can sit in the café for hours talking with friends.

sentences.arabic: الْمَقْهَى أَكْثَرُ مِنْ مَكَانٍ لِلشُّرْبِ فَهُوَ مَرْكَزٌ لِلْحَيَاةِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kafana je više od mjesta za piće — ona je središte društvenog života.
sentences.translationEn: The coffeehouse is more than a place to drink — it is a centre of social life.
